results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_10', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a1.m1', 'new_EK_PORT_10', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if any(edge[1] == 'ju1.a1.m1' and edge[2]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] for edge in graph_copy.edges(data=True))]
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {
        'type': 'list',
        'data': child_nodes,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
    return return_object

results.Query: Add new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_79 to ju1.a3.dom. List direct child nodes of ju1.a3.dom in the updated graph. Return a list of child nodes name.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-3, add-list
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_79', type=['EK_PACKET_SWITCH'])
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a3.dom', 'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_79', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if any(edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and edge[0] == 'ju1.a3.dom' for edge in graph_copy.edges(data=True)) or any(edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and edge[0] == 'ju1.a3.dom' for edge in graph_copy.edges(data=True))]
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if any(edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and edge[0] == 'ju1.a3.dom' for edge in graph_copy.out_edges(node[0], data=True))]
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return {'type': 'list', 'data': child_nodes, 'updated_graph': graph_json}
